name: Black Bean Veggie Burger
tagline: Smoky black bean patties with oats, no eggs, holds together cleanly

hero.alt: Black bean burger on bun with lettuce and pickled onion
hero.caption: black bean burger — smoky

steps.title: Make flax egg, dry beans
steps.detail: Stir flax with hot water, rest 8 min. Spread beans on a tray and dry in a 350°F oven 12 min — patties hold up better when beans aren't wet.
steps.tip: Skipping the dry-out is the #1 reason burger patties fall apart.

steps.title: Mash and mix
steps.detail: Pulse oats to a coarse meal in a food processor. Add beans, flax egg, sautéed onion-garlic-spices, soy. Pulse to a chunky paste — leave texture.
steps.tip: Over-processing makes a paste that bakes flat. Pulse, don't puree.

steps.title: Form and chill
steps.detail: Form 4 patties. Chill 15 min — they firm up and brown better.
steps.tip: Wet hands prevent the mix from sticking. Form thicker than you think — they don't shrink like beef.

steps.title: Sear or bake
steps.detail: Pan-fry 4 min per side in oil over medium, or bake at 400°F for 18 min, flipping once. Build on toasted buns.
steps.tip: Crisp crust = sear. Tender all the way through = bake. Both work.

healthFacts: No eggs — flax egg + oats bind.
Black beans + oats together provide a complete plant protein profile.
Smoked paprika replaces bacon flavor with no animal products.
